title: Glowite Delight
description: Adds a new ore called Glowite with armor, tools, glowsticks, and more!
body:
# Glowite Delight [Glowite+]!
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1247254072696897596?label=join%20our%20discord&logo=discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/T5nnUu9CWv)


This mod adds a new ore called Glowite. You can create armor, throwable bombs, glowsticks and tools from this.

I am also open to suggestions in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/T5nnUu9CWv)



# ❓ Why should you download?

Because why would you not want to? its fun.
